name: Unity WebGL
description: Embeds a Unity WebGL build. Handles the full boot sequence (init → preload → load → start), the SetData translation injection, and all Unity↔JS events (end, navigation, tracking, apiRequest).
notes: Add UnityCanvas to gameplay/page.tsx — it manages its own boot sequence.
setData() is called automatically inside UnityCanvas before loadScene().
Extend IUnityInput in lib/game-bridge/game-bridge.types.ts for campaign-specific fields (team data, etc.).
